scenes.scene_narration: The detective examined the crime scene carefully. Something was not quite right. The evidence pointed in two directions, each more puzzling than the last.
scenes.scene_narration_plain: The detective examined the crime scene carefully. Something was not quite right. The evidence pointed in two directions, each more puzzling than the last.
scenes.scene_narration_ssml: <speak><prosody rate="medium">The detective examined the crime scene carefully. <break time="360ms"/> Something was not quite right. <break time="360ms"/> The evidence pointed in two directions, <break time="180ms"/> each more puzzling than the last.</prosody></speak>

scenes.scene_narration: A whisper echoed through the empty corridor. Who was there? The shadow moved, barely visible in the dim light.
scenes.scene_narration_plain: A whisper echoed through the empty corridor. Who was there? The shadow moved, barely visible in the dim light.
scenes.scene_narration_ssml: <speak><amazon:effect phonation="soft"><prosody rate="slow">A whisper echoed through the empty corridor. <break time="360ms"/> Who was there? <break time="360ms"/> The shadow moved, <break time="180ms"/> barely visible in the dim light.</prosody></amazon:effect></speak>

scenes.scene_narration: The revelation hit like a thunderbolt. Everything made sense now. The clues, the suspects, the timeline. It all connected.
scenes.scene_narration_plain: The revelation hit like a thunderbolt. Everything made sense now. The clues, the suspects, the timeline. It all connected.
